title: Discounted Internet Service * Native American Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Discounted Internet Service * Native American Community 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON PUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION TRIBAL PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a reduction in the monthly cost or installation of phone or broadband service. The Tribal Lifeline program offers a $25 discount per month. The Tribal Link Up program provides a one-time discount of up to $100 on the initial installation or activation of wireline or wireless phone service. Federal and state regulations limit the Lifeline benefit to one person per household for phone or high-speed internett service. 201 High Street SE Suite 100 Salem, OR 973013398 Eligibility: Individuals and households at or below 135% of the Federal Poverty level or who are receiving one of the following benefits: Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP), Supplemental Security Income (SSI), Medicaid, Federal Public Housing Assistance, or Veterans/Survivors Pension benefits who live on the federally-recognized tribal lands which are as follows: -Burns Paiute Tribe -Confederated Tribes of Coos, Lower Umpqua, and Siuslaw Indians -Confederated Tribes of Grande Ronde -Confederated Tribes of Siletz Indians -Confederated Tribes of Warm Springs -Coquille Indian Tribe -Cow Creek Band of Umpqua Tribe of Indians -Klamath Tribes Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm. Closed on state recognized holidays. Email (503) 373-7171 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON PUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION TRIBAL PROGRAMS
